<!--
PR-type: docs (documentation-only change)

Use for changes confined to docs/, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, or other
markdown content. If the PR also changes source code, use ?template=implementer.md
or another non-docs template instead.
-->

## What changed

\<Sections / files updated. If this is a substantive doc rewrite, link to the prior version's section anchor so the diff is easy to follow.\>

## Why

\<What is the doc's job, and what previously failed at that job? Out-of-date guidance, ambiguity, missing context, etc.\>

## Scope confirmation

- [ ] No source code changes (otherwise pick a different template)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` clean (Markdown formatting)
- [ ] Internal links resolve (verified manually or with a link-checker)
- [ ] No breaking changes to anchor links other PRs / issues may reference
